official_name: Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik
notes: German federal cybersecurity agency. **NOTE: distinct from British Standards Institution (`bsigroup.com`)** — different country, different organization. BSI Germany publishes IT-Grundschutz (the German national IT-security framework — FREE download), the BSI Technical Guidelines (TR series), and the German eID infrastructure specs.

data.notes: FREE download (PDF + Kompendium HTML) with BSI Germany copyright. The dominant national-cybersecurity framework in Germany. Aligned with ISO/IEC 27001. Mostly in German; partial English translations.
Free download; copyright retained. Notable TRs: TR-03124 (eID-Client), TR-03127 (Authentication Service for eID-Card), TR-03130 (eID-Server), TR-03159 (Mobile Identity Documents).
Free technical specs via BSI TRs.
